The People

Engineering is
a team
sport.

Behind every project delivery, every precision calculation and every on-time handover is a team of 115 engineers who chose to build their careers around excellence. Part of Parlym Group, PROECO brings together specialists across a wide range of disciplines — united by a shared commitment to solving the problems others find extremely difficult to address.

“We don't hire engineers who know the answers. We hire engineers who ask the right questions.”

Engineering Services

Full-Spectrum
Capability

An integrated team of 115 Internal Specialists and 160+ Total Engineers covering every engineering discipline required for complex industrial projects.

View All Services
Process Engineering
Process Simulation, PFD, P&ID, HAZOP, Hydraulic Calculations and Feasibility Studies from Concept to Detail Design.
Civil & Structural
Foundations, steel structures, concrete design, piping supports and plot plans for industrial facilities.
Mechanical & Piping
Equipment specification, stress analysis, 3D piping design, skids & packages engineering.
Electrical & Instrumentation
Power systems, single-line diagrams, instrument datasheets, control philosophy and SIL studies.
Automation & Control
DCS/PLC architecture, cause & effect diagrams, safety instrumented systems and SCADA engineering.
Fire & Safety
Fire protection systems, QRA, risk assessment, emergency response engineering and ATEX classification.
Latest News

From the
Field

All News
Project Award March 2025

PROECO Awarded Engineering Contract for LNG Terminal Expansion in West Africa

Our multidisciplinary team has been selected to lead the FEED and detailed engineering for a major LNG terminal capacity upgrade, covering process, civil, mechanical and instrumentation disciplines.

Read more
Technology February 2025

Digital Twin Delivery: First Full 3D As-Built Model for Offshore Refinery Platform

Using Aveva E3D and laser scanning technology, PROECO completed the first fully integrated digital twin for an offshore refinery platform, achieving sub-2mm scan accuracy across 14 decks.

Read more
Company January 2025

PROECO Expands Engineering Team to 115 Permanent Specialists

Following a record year in project deliveries, PROECO has grown its permanent in-house team to 115 specialists, reinforcing its commitment to zero-outsourcing of core engineering across all disciplines.

Read more
